title: Loader
description: Powerful and customizable Loader Framer component. Customize colors, line width and transition to make it your own and elevate your no-code website.

title: Pro Display
description: Present your image, video or iframe content in a stunning way. Adjust screen glow and choose between light and dark stand options to elevate your no-code website.

title: Grid Loader
description: Animated character grid with staggered looping effects. Create unique typographic loader animations or build dynamic visual patterns that elevate your no-code website.

title: Theme Toggle
description: Allow your users to switch between dark and light styles. Use the included utility component to show different layers depending on the active color scheme.

title: Nolan Barret
description: A Framer portfolio template for individuals who value restraint, clarity, and focus. Minimal framework with purposeful details — lets your work take center stage.

title: Sensa
description: A beautifully designed website template for online therapy services with a warm and welcoming identity. Customizable to fit your branding and showcase your unique services.

title: Art & Objects
description: The ultimate vintage store template. Showcasing vintage and contemporary pieces that enrich the modern living space — timeless beauty and captivating design.

title: Ora
description: A sleek and vibrant Framer template designed for contemporary agencies and innovative projects. Striking layout with smooth transitions and smart interactions.
